subject_convention: Array of 3 subject templates per niche. Index 0 = curiosity, 1 = value-prop, 2 = soft-urgency. Renderer picks one uniformly at random. Use {businessName} / {city} placeholders.

niches.audience: homeowners who've weathered storms OR aging roofs
niches.primary_pain: storm seasons drive emergency demand but no-shows eat margins; phone tag with insurance adjusters
subject_templates: {businessName} — quick sanity check on storm-season intake?
Built a 60-sec roof checklist for {businessName} in {city}
Next hail window in {city} — {businessName} ready for the surge?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, quick one — last week's storm rolled through {city} and {businessName} ended up on the top of a half-dozen 'do I need a new roof?' searches this morning. I've got a 60-second checklist your office can text to homeowners before they call the insurance adjuster — works for hail OR wind. Worth a 5-minute look?

Saw {businessName} is still answering the phone after-hours by hand; my hunch is you can replace up to 70% of that with one good follow-up text. Mapped it out for a roofer in {city} last quarter. Want me to send the script?
niches.followup_pain: payment-on-completion means cash-flow gap, deposits are awkward to ask for
niches.followup_hook: When the next storm cell pops in {city}, you'll want 3 jobs pre-sold, not 3 callbacks unanswered.

niches.primary_pain: leads from Zillow/Redfin are auctioned to 3 other agents simultaneously; seller pipelines are dry
subject_templates: {businessName} — past-circle leads worth reviving?
4-touch sequence pulling 38% of cold leads back for {city} agents
Spring inventory is open — {businessName} ready?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, the listing inventory in {city} finally thawed. Most agents I work with say their #1 leak is past-circle leads going cold by 11pm the same day. Built a 4-touch text sequence that revives ~38% of them. Send it over?

If {businessName}'s pipeline looks anything like most teams in {city}, you've got 60+ contacts in your CRM who raised their hand two springs ago. Easy $20K if we reheat 10 of them — want the playbook?
niches.followup_pain: speed-to-lead > 5 minutes means 10x lower conversion
niches.followup_hook: What's your current average response time to a new Zillow ping — under 5 minutes or over an hour?

niches.primary_pain: no-shows that ghost the morning of, hygiene recare < 30%, insurance write-offs
subject_templates: {businessName} — recare texts have a quiet leak
$80K/year stays in your chair if {businessName}'s no-show list shrinks
Hygiene recare window — {businessName} scrubbing the 6-month list?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, the average {city} dental practice loses ~$80K/year to no-shows that nobody calls back until they fall off the books. {businessName} doesn't need a marketing agency — you need one person running recare text sequences. I've got the exact copy + cadence. Look?
niches.followup_pain: doctor fatigue from denture / surgical sales conversations
niches.followup_hook: Not asking you to take more calls — asking you to take better ones.

niches.primary_pain: summer/winter peaks mean missed calls = lost installs, dispatcher overwhelmed
subject_templates: {businessName} — what's actually happening to the 6pm call?
$8K/week in {city} HVAC dispatch leaks back to the operator
First 95° day is closer than {businessName} thinks
opener_hooks: {firstName}, when {city} hits 95° your dispatcher becomes a triage nurse. {businessName} is probably turning $8K of work away a week on a missed second call. Built a 3-step intake flow that triages 70% without the call ringing. Worth 5 minutes?
niches.followup_pain: summer/fall seasonality = feast or famine cashflow
niches.followup_hook: What's your average callback miss rate during the heat dome last summer — 20%, 40%, more?

niches.audience: small law firms, solo practitioners, plaintiff/probate/immigration specialists
niches.primary_pain: intake calls happen after 6pm, intake staff burns out, retainer-card abandonment
subject_templates: {businessName} — intake form losing consults before the phone rings?
Bar-compliant intake re-order for {city} firms (small change)
Day-end consult missed calls — {businessName} seeing them?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, saw {businessName}'s intake form on your site — it asks for the case detail before asking one qualifying question. That's likely where your firm loses ~35% of consults before the call rings. Mapped the swap for a 4-attorney PI firm in {city}. Quick look?
niches.followup_pain: bar-ad rules on solicitation — every email needs careful wording
niches.followup_hook: All copy is bar-compliant — neutral, informational, no guarantees.

niches.primary_pain: purchase market has cratered, refi window closed, realtors ghosting
subject_templates: {businessName} — when rates move, do your realtors hear from you?
1-page co-marketing kit (TRID-safe) for {businessName}'s top realtors
Realtor partners in {city} — {businessName} on their text-update list?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, when rates move 25bps, your realtor partners get three texts and zero plan. {businessName}'s likely getting left off those texts now. Built a one-page co-marketing kit (compliance-approved) that loan officers in {city} send to their top 20 realtors. Have 5 min?
niches.followup_pain: TRID + state compliance rules are tight — generic copy fails
niches.followup_hook: Every line has a compliance-review marker; I work with TRID-safe phrasing.

niches.primary_pain: renewals quietly lapse, cross-sell is awkward, agents reluctant to call
subject_templates: {businessName} — what's the renewal cadence on the 20% expiring soon?
Re-quote sequence for carriers {businessName} writes
Annual review window — {businessName} clearing it?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, in {city} my hunch is 20% of {businessName}'s book is up for renewal in the next 60 days and you're calling them cold with a renewal reminder. Mapped a 4-touch sequence that turns 41% of cold renewals into a re-quote conversation. Send it over?
niches.followup_pain: compliance carrier rules vary — language must be carrier-approved
niches.followup_hook: I only use language approved by State Farm, Allstate, Progressive, etc.

niches.audience: boutique studios, CrossFit boxes, personal trainer studios
niches.primary_pain: January member bands, March drop-off, intro offers eat margin
subject_templates: {businessName} — the January leavers still have a phone number
3-word text recovering 15% of intro-offer no-shows
March drop-off window — {businessName} pre-loading?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, {businessName}'s probably sitting on 200 leads from January who took the intro offer and never came back. With {city}'s weather warming up, 15% of them re-buy if you text the right 3-words. Built the exact copy — want it?
niches.followup_pain: high churn, retention is the only path to profitability
niches.followup_hook: Your hardest customers are the ones who went silent — they have a reason.

niches.audience: residential plumbers, 1–3 truck shops, occasional commercial
niches.primary_pain: after-hours calls missed, water-heater emergencies cannibalize crew time
subject_templates: {businessName} — who picks up the 8am Sunday call?
After-hours text agent for 1-truck shops like {businessName}
Water-heater season opens in {city} — {businessName} ready?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, half the calls {businessName} is missing in {city} are on Sunday at 8am when nobody picks up. Companies like yours typically recover 60% of those with a single after-hours text agent. Built the exact script. Worth a quick look?
niches.followup_pain: truck-roll economics — every missed dispatch is lost margin
niches.followup_hook: Water heater replacements this fall — what's your top-of-mind bottleneck now?

niches.audience: single-truck operators, often cross-marketing with HVAC
niches.primary_pain: highly seasonal (spring/fall), education-heavy premium service
subject_templates: {businessName} — the 90-second IAQ test on every doorstep?
Allergy-season closing rate doubles with one add-on — {businessName}?
Spring duct surge 6 weeks away — {businessName} already filling?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, in {city} the average family has 6x more dust in their ductwork than meets FDA clean-air thresholds. {businessName} could double close-rate by adding a 90-second indoor-air test to the doorstep consult. Have the script — want it?
niches.followup_pain: low-frequency service means customer list goes cold fast
niches.followup_hook: Last winter — did you snag any furnace + duct bundling?

niches.audience: small exterior contractors, often bundled with roofing
niches.primary_pain: dependent on weather events, hard to forecast pipeline
subject_templates: {businessName} — standalone gutter jobs vs. roofing overflow?
Fall-clean 3-message sequence pulled $18K last October — {businessName}?
First leaves dropping in {city} — {businessName} inbound ready?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, if {businessName} handles gutter calls as overflow from roofing work, you're leaving 30% of revenue on the table. Mapped a 3-message fall-clean sequence that pulled $18K of standalone jobs for a 2-truck outfit in {city} last fall. Want the script?
niches.followup_pain: fall rush crushes ops, missed leads bin
niches.followup_hook: How many fall-clean jobs landed in October alone?

niches.audience: commercial snow contractors, residential driveway services
niches.primary_pain: seasonal contracts signed too late, route mapping chaos, late-night dispatch
subject_templates: {businessName} — when do commercial contracts lock in {city}?
4-touch August sequence that pulled 22 contracts last winter
Property managers in {city} decide in September — {businessName} on the list?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, commercial property managers in {city} start locking snow contracts in early September. {businessName} probably loses 40% of them to whoever emailed first. Mapped a 4-touch August sequence that's pulled 22 contracts at $4K each. Look?
niches.followup_pain: cashflow bimodal — heavy winter, dead summer
niches.followup_hook: What's the busiest month for renewal calls — October, November, December?

niches.primary_pain: route density, weather cancels, upsells to fertilization ignored
subject_templates: {businessName} — when {city} homeowners budget their lawn spend?
2-touch email lands 4× the close-rate vs. last year — {businessName}?
Biweekly route opens this week — {businessName} filling them?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, this is the week {city} homeowners start mentally budget their lawn spend. {businessName} has a 6-week window where a 2-touch email lands four-times the close-rate vs. last year. Built it. Worth 5 min?
niches.followup_pain: cancellation spikes mid-summer during heat waves
niches.followup_hook: Best summer retention trick you've tried — discount, pause, something else?

niches.primary_pain: emergency calls outpace scheduled pruning, insurance paperwork lost
subject_templates: {businessName} — own post-storm tree searches in {city}?
30-second intake form wins the 6-hour window — {businessName}?
Storm season opens — {businessName}'s on the radar?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, post-storm tree work in {city} shows up on Google 6 hours before the homeowner calls. {businessName} can own those searches with a 30-second intake form. Mapped the exact intake. Look?
niches.followup_pain: equipment + insurance claims — paperwork eats weekends
niches.followup_hook: What's your current weekend admin ratio — 10%, 30%?

niches.audience: in-home care agencies, senior care placement
niches.primary_pain: families need help fast — slow intake loses placements, regulator paperwork slow
subject_templates: {businessName} — same-hour callback for crisis-mode families?
Crisis-intake sequence for in-home agencies in {city}
Family decision window — {businessName} answering after 6pm?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, the average {city} family who reaches out for in-home care is in crisis — they've called 2 agencies and gotten voicemail. {businessName} can offer a same-hour callback that lands 60% of them. Built the script. Want a look?
niches.followup_pain: burnout — caregiver turnover is brutal on quality
niches.followup_hook: How's your current caregiver-month-to-month retention — over or under 70%?

niches.primary_pain: diagnostic disputes, parts delays, warranty pushback
subject_templates: {businessName} — second-opinion texts before or after?
Trust-sequence for high-ticket estimates at {businessName}
Estimate-week opens — {businessName}'s intake feels how?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, the moment a {city} customer gets a $1.2K estimate, they text three friends for a 'second opinion.' {businessName} could pre-empt that with a 2-message trust sequence before they walk in. Mapped it. Worth a quick look?
niches.followup_pain: shop capacity — diagnostics are the bottleneck
niches.followup_hook: How many estimates do you write a week that don't come back for the job?

niches.primary_pain: one-time cleans don't convert, crew churn, low-margin scheduling
subject_templates: {businessName} — first-recurring-clean conversion in {city}
Post-quote 2-message that converts 6/week — {businessName}?
Spring deep-clean window — {businessName} filling?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, the {city} homeowner database I'm seeing — 1 in 7 is hiring their first recurring cleaner this spring. {businessName} could land 6 of those/week with a 2-message post-quote sequence. Built it. Want it?
niches.followup_pain: cancellation stings — every lost weekly is 2 months revenue gone
niches.followup_hook: If a recurring client pauses — do you ever re-engage them with a 'we missed you' text?

niches.primary_pain: Q2-Q3 surge, recurring revenue invisible to homeowners
subject_templates: {businessName} — pre-season termite swarms 4 weeks out
8%-of-ZIP-code capture for {businessName}'s spring pre-season
Recurring-renewal window — {businessName} reminding?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, {city} termite swarms in 4 weeks and most homeowners don't realize until carpenter ants show up. {businessName} can run a 2-touch pre-season sequence that lands 8% of the ZIP code. Have the copy. Look?
niches.followup_pain: service is invisible — customer forgets they have you
niches.followup_hook: What's your average annual contract value — closer to $500 or $1,200?

niches.primary_pain: off-season silence, equipment-failure premium pricing awkward
subject_templates: {businessName} — pools-in-{city} panic-Googling this week?
March-open sequence pulled 3-5 jobs/week — {businessName}?
Pre-season contracts open — {businessName} on the route sheet?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, in {city} pools open in 5–6 weeks. Most homeowners start panic-Googling when their water turns green. {businessName} can land 3–5 of those/week with a March-open sequence. Have the copy. Look?
niches.followup_pain: pump/filter upsells feel pushy, missed recurring renewals
niches.followup_hook: Best upsell-to-service-ratio — feels high enough?

niches.primary_pain: estimates weak, color-selection conversations long, project manager burned out
subject_templates: {businessName} — why 38% of written estimates never decide?
2-message follow-up that flips estimates — {businessName}?
Estimate pipeline week — {businessName}'s follow-up looks how?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, the top {city} painters I talk to all share one stat — 38% of their written estimates never decide. {businessName} can flip that with a 2-message follow-up sequence. Mapped the exact cadence. Look?
niches.followup_pain: scheduling bursty, job gaps hurt cashflow
niches.followup_hook: Last week — how many estimates did you send out, how many decisions did you get?

niches.primary_pain: highly seasonal, customer never returns after one job
subject_templates: {businessName} — 90-day-later re-engagement copy ready
Annual-care sequence lands 30+ returning jobs/year
Heavy-season opens — {businessName}'s route full?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, after one driveway wash the customer forgets you exist. {businessName} can re-engage 90 days later with a 2-message annual-care sequence. Built it. Want it?
niches.followup_pain: single-tour service — no recurring model
niches.followup_hook: How many returning customers in a typical year — 1 in 5, fewer?

niches.primary_pain: permit/inspection scheduling, emergency pricing awkwardness
subject_templates: {businessName} — own the '{city} electrician near me' Google post?
1-message welcome lands 4 calls/week — {businessName}?
Panel-upgrade quote week opens — {businessName}?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, every month {city} homeowners search 'electrician near me' 800+ times. {businessName} could capture 4 of them/week with a single post on Google Business + a 1-message welcome. Mapped it. Look?
niches.followup_pain: panel-upgrade sales lost to bundling hesitation
niches.followup_hook: How many panel-upgrade quotes did you write last month — 5, 15, more?

niches.primary_pain: post-care plan abandonment, reactivations ignored
subject_templates: {businessName} — who's reactivating from your post-care-plan list?
3-touch reactivation that pulls 22% back — {businessName}?
February reactivation window — {businessName}'s list warming?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, I see this pattern in {city} every month — patients who finished their care plan in October don't return in February. {businessName} could land 22% of them back with a 3-touch re-engagement sequence. Built it. Look?
niches.followup_pain: wellness-care positioning vs. acute-care reality
niches.followup_hook: What's your reactivations-per-month ratio — 5%, 10%, higher?

niches.primary_pain: post-visit customers don't return, gift-list conversion weak
subject_templates: {businessName} — 1,500 quiet subscribers worth reviving?
3-touch 'we miss you' pulled 14% back — {businessName}?
Loyalty window — {businessName} reaching the quiet 80%?
opener_hooks: {firstName}, {businessName} probably has 1,500+ email subscribers who've bought once and gone quiet. {city} retail outfits are recovering 14% of those with a single 'we miss you' 3-touch sequence. Have it. Look?
niches.followup_pain: foot traffic migrated online, repeat visits hard to manufacture
niches.followup_hook: What's your typical first-purchase-to-second-purchase lag — 30 days, 90 days, more?
